titleStmt.title: SII 23.416: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 416. (A.R. No. 416 of 1907.) Periyakuḷam, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Kailāsanātha temple—on the west, south and north bases Māṟ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya I: year 17+1+1: 1234-35 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with a long introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumaḍandaiyum etc. giving a detailed account of the king's triumphs against the Chōḷa and also others. He is stated to have celebrated the anointment of heroes at Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻapuram (Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻapuram) after conquering the Chōḷa country. The inscription registers a gift of 7(1/2) mā of land to the south of Ālaṅguḷam inclusive of kaḍamai to the temple of Uyyavanda-Īśvaramuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār on the hill at Vēḻkularāmanallūr in Mēneḍuṅgaḷanāḍu, on the representation to the king made by the authorities of the temple of Nāyaṉār at Eṟipaḍainallūr while the former was camping at Ālaṅguḷam. Land was also granted by order of the king for the formation of a tirumaḍaiviḷāgam round the temple, so that the rents maṉaiyiṟai, kuḍimai etc. from the houses thereon could be utilised for burning the lights in the temple. The order is signed at the end by (the officers) Duvārapati Vēḷāṉ and Duvārapati-Brahmādhirājaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvimaṭantaiyum puyattiruppa nāmaruviya kalaimaṭantaiyuñ ceyamaṭantaiyum nalañciṟappa koḷānta ciṉappuliyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅ kulaintoḷippa vāḷānta po
ṟkirimel varikkayalkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa Iruṅkaṭal valaiyattiṉiṟp peṟukka karuṅkali turantu ceṅkol naṭappa Oru kuṭai niḻalil Irunilaṅkuḷira muvakait tamiḻum muṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nālvakai vetamu
m naviṉṟuṭaṉ vaḷara Aivakai veḻviyuñ ceyviṉai yiyaṟṟa Aṟuvakaic camaiyamu maḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa veḻuvakaip pāṭalu miyaluṭaṉ parava veṇṭi caiyaḷavuñ cakkarañ cellak koṅkaṇar kaliṅkar kocalar mā
ḷavar ciṅkaḷar teliṅkar ciḷalar kuccalar villavar makatar(r) vikkalar cempiyar pallavar mutaliyar pāṟtivarelā muṟaiviṭa maruḷeṉ ṟoruvar muṉṉoruvar muṟaimuṟai kaṭava tiṟaikuṇantiṟaiñca Ilaṅ koḷi maṇimu
ṭi yintiraṉ pūṭṭiya pulaṉkatirāramārviṉiṟ poliya paṉimalart tāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta maṉuneṟi taḻaippa maṇimuṭicūṭip poṉṉicūḻ nāṭṭiṟ puliyāṇai poyakalak kaṉṉicūḻ nāṭṭiṟ kayalā
ṇai kaiyvaḷara veñciṉa vivuḷiyum veḻamum parappit taiñcaiyu muṟain taiyuñ centaḻal koḷuttik kāviyu nilamu niṉṟu kavi niḻaṟṟa vāvi yum ciṟumaṇi nirnalaṉaḻittuk kūṭamum māmatuḷuṅ kopuramu māṭara
ṅku māṭamu māḷikaiyu maṇṭapaṅkaḷ pala viṭittut toḻutu vantaṭaiyā nirupartantevimā raḻutakaṇṇinirāṟu parappi kaḻutai koṭuḻutu kavaṭi viccic cempiyaṉaic ciramariyapporutu curam pukavoṭṭip paim
poṉ maṇimuṭi paṟittup pāṇaṉukkuk kuṭuttaruḷip pāṭaruñ ciṟappiṟ parutivāṉṟoyāṭakap puricai yāyirattaḷiyiṟ coravaḷavaṉ Abhiṣeka maṇṭapattu virābhiṣekañ ceytu pukaḻ virittu nāḷum pararācamu nāmatta
lai piṭiṅkiyiḷūn taṟukaṇ matavāḷai melkoṇṭu nirāḻivaiyamuḻutum potuvaḻittuk kūrāḻiyuñ ceyyatoḷu meykoṇṭu poyyap paṭāta Arumaṟaiyor tentuṇar vāḻ teyvap puliyū
ṟ tiruvellaiyiṟ pukuntu poṉṉampalam poliya varavor pūvaiyuṭaṉ maṉṉun tirumeṉi kaṇṭu maṉaṅkaḷittuk kolamalar melayaṉuṅ kuḷir tuḻāymālu maṟiyā malaṟ cevaṭi vaṇaṅ
ki vāṅku ciṟakaṉṉan tuyileḻuppa vaṇṭeḻum pūmpūṅkayal vāvicūḻ poṉṉamarāpatiyi lottulakan tāṅku muyar meruvaik kuṇantu vaittaṉaiya cotimaṇimaṇṭapattiru
ntu colaimali paḻaṉac coṇāṭu toḷiḻanta mālaimuṭiyun taravaruka veṉṟaḻaippa vallā nilattellai vāḷakirikkap puṟattup poṉavaḷava
ṉurimaiyoṭum pukuntu peṟṟa putalvaṉai niṉpereṉ �ṭṭi veṟṟiyaṭi yiṇaikkiḻ viḻuntu toḻutirantu tāṉoṭi muṉceṉṟa vemmai yelāṅ kaiyyakalat tāṉo
takam paṇṇi muṭiyuṭaṉey viṭṭak kaṭaikkaḷa tiriya miṭṭa vitu piṭipāṭākavey poṅku tirai ñālattup pūpālar toḷ viḷaṅkuñ ceṅkaya koṇṭu ṉaṟuntirumuka
mum paṇ vatiyeṉṉu nāmamunto ruḷi tekkaṭaṟ pārnila ventar kkuṟṟaṅketaṅkaḷ tiṟakuṅkapaḷḷi keṉṟeṇṇi taḷai Aṟṟa
ṭaiyāta ṭaiyiṉ kiṉaiyuṟṟaṉa muḻutu ṅkaṉ ciṟaiyiḷavaṇṭiṉ kaṇaṅkoḷ tiruttoḷmālai kaḻittel vaḻa Aruḷiyapiṉ maṟṟoru nāḷ pa
ṟṟā muḻaṅ ttineṉ kaṇaṅka teṉkoṅkaṉ patti paṭṭu taṇ ṭaṉukkum poṅkac cāttiya Āparaṇa ṭeṉa vaḻaṅki Ātta pe
ru naṇpaṉ ciṟaiyum mālunāḷ ṭavuḷeṉa māṭamaturaiyil tāṉ ponta pavaṉiyile kūṭṭukkot Aṅkum viṭu koṇṭavar
tam tollaip puvikkup piṇaṅkāman tā Icaivu tiṭṭeṟpak koṇṭivvāṟu ceyyātoḻiyil Iyamaṉukku vevvel viruntākkuva tummaiyeṉa viṭṭaruḷi muṉṉa
namakku muṭivaḻaṅkuñ cevaṭikkiḻ Iṉṉam va ḷ kāvaleṉatu poṉṉi nāṭeṉuṅ kaḷiyālevaletiṟkkoḷḷā tiṟaimaṟukkac ceṉṉi viṭuntūciyum poṉiyum Okkac
curuṇṭotuṅka vāciyum vāraṇamum te Āṭu maṭṭuṇṇak kaṇṭu payaṅkai koṇṭu velāvalaiyattu viḻntavaṉ poy meṉṉa ṭuṅkavum paruntumākat taṭamaṇṭali karumal
vemparuntum peyum vicantuṇṇa Akkaḷa ḷaiyiṉa veḷmaruyyu ṅkai yuṅ kuṟaitteṅka miṉavaṟkup pālkuṭamāmeṉṟu tayir koḷamāka mukaṭu taṭavi maḻai taṭukkuṅkāka neṭum pantaṟ kavattati
tiṉuṭalum kūkaiyiṉ pāṭalum kaṇṭuṅkeṭṭu �ttiṭṭelakkarun ṟṟa Ivaṉeyiṟṟuc cevvāyp poṟ kulakkai valli pali koḻkaveṉa vāḻtti veṉṟu pakaiyiṉ mikaiyoḻiya ventalaṟ ko
ṉṟuñ ciṉantaṭaikkoṟṟa neṭuvāḷiya karuti nirāṟṟoṭu ceṅka
ḷaṅ kuḻāvāṅkavaṉ kaṭṭaṇattuk kaṟpput tamakkāṇā voṅku murimaik kuḻāmoṭuṅkak kaikkoṇṭu murimaṇippaṭiya ṭammuṭicūṭimār
vilaṇaittu vaḷavaṉ mutaṟṟeviyeṉap peṟppeṟṟa vaci mutalāy vāṭ ṭaṅ kaṇṭey vaḷaiyārpoṅku puyavāṅka yentamaṅ ṅkaṇṭu maṇikka
kkalattentituṭikoṇṭa neṟṟittiṟaṟ kopurañ cūḻ muṭikoṇṭa coḻapura maṇṭapattup puratticaitoṟuñ cempoṟ ceyattampam
nāṭṭi vicaiya Aviṣekam paṇṇiyaruḻ ceytu vākai katirvel vaṭa ventar tam pātam mekattiriyaṇaimel virakkaḻalaṇintu viḷaṅkiya maṇimuṭi vira
siṅhāsaṉattu vaḷaṅkeḻu kavari Irumaruṅ kacaippak kaṭaleṉa muḻaṅ kuṅ kaṭinalliyāṇai vaṭapulaventar paṇiya Aympiraṉ Ilaku kuḻalari vayarto
ḻutu niṉṟetta Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya ci komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu muṭi koṇṭa coḻapurat
tu virar Aviṣekam paṇṇiyaruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉ Eḻāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mārkaḻimā
sam Eṟipaṭai nallūr nāyaṉār kaṇakkapaṇṭārikaḷom Ālaṅkuḷattil nāyaṉār Eḻuntaḷiyiruntu meṉeṭuṅkaḷa nāṭṭu veḷ(ḻ)kula
rāmaṉallūr tirumalaiyil nāyaṉāṟku tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili paṇṇikkuṭukkaveṉṟu Allicceytamaiyil Ālaṅkuḷattil paṟṟukku teṟ kaṭaiya
veḻkularāmaṉpaṟṟil kiḻellai Uṭaiyaperumāḷ Ūruṇikke niṉṟu vaṭakkil peruvāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai mi paṭaivallavaṉi
la Empalukkup pokiṟa vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai teṟku nokki pokiṟa vaḻikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ivvāyk kālukku
teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam corviṉṟi nāyaṉāṟku Iṟaiyili kuṭuttamaikkum Innāyaṉāṟku kaṭamaiyil nila
m Irumāvaraiyum tampirāṭṭiyār cuntarāṇṭāṟku nilam Iraṇṭu māvum viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟku nilam Oru māvum kuṉṟameṟinta piḷḷai yāṟ
ku nilam Orumāvum vaṭukappiḷḷaiyāṟku nilam morumāvum Āka nilam Eḻumā varaiyil kaṭamaiyum Irācentiracoḻaccilaiceṭṭikuḷam tiruveḻaḻakiyāṉ
kaṭamaiyile Inilam Eḻumāvaraiyāl vanta kaṭamai kuṭukka Allic ceytamaiyil Ikkaṭamaiyum Innilamum piramāṇam paṇṇikku ṭuttom
nāyaṉār kaṇakku paṇṭārikaḷom Uyyavantayiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil śrī rudra śrīmāheśvaraṟku Ippaṭi cantirātitavaṟ nam peṇṭukaḷ perā
le cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷkaveṉṟu Allic ceytamaikku Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻakapperumāḷāṉa cokkaṉ Āṇmai Aḻaki
yāṉāṉa tuvarāpativeḷāṉ Eḻuttu Aruḷicceyal Uyyavanta yiśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟkum tevarkaṉmikaḷukkum Innā
yaṉāṟku tirumaṭaiviḷāka māvvatākap pāṟaikkum maṟṟu paṭaivallavaṉ kālukku meṟkku Innāyaṉār tirumalaikku vaṭakku Ātaṉūrp peru vaḻikku kiḻa
kkum Innāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku teṟku Āka Innāṉku Ellaikkuṭ paṭṭa nilam tirumaṭaiviḷākam Eṟuvatākat tantom Ippaṭi tiruma
ṭaiviḷākam Eṟiṭutta tirumaṭaiviḷākattil maṉaiyiṟai kuṭimai maṟṟu me
ppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Innāyaṉār koyilukkut tiruviḷakkuppuṟamākak koṇṭu
Ippaṭi cantirātityavaṟ celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi vittukkoḷka
Ivai tuvarāpativeḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tuvārapati brahmādhirājaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭic ceytapaṭi kallil veṭṭiṉeṉ Ikkoyil taccācāriyaṉ kuppai AppaṉāṉaStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.416 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
